title: PricingActionParameters - Metadata API
description: Represents the pricing action that's associated with a context definition and pricing procedure.

contextDefinition.description: Context definition record that's associated with the pricing action.

contextMapping.description: Context mapping record that's associated with the pricing action.

developerName.description: Unique name of the pricing action parameter record. The name must begin with a letter and use only alphanumeric characters and underscores. The name must not include spaces, end with an underscore, or have two consecutive underscores.

effectiveFrom.description: Date and time from when the pricing action becomes effective.

effectiveTo.description: Date and time till when the pricing action is in effect.

masterLabel.description: Master label of the pricing action parameter.

objectName.description: Name of the object that's associated with the pricing action. Valid values are: Case Contract Opportunity Order Quote SalesAgreement WorkOrder

pricingProcedure.description: Pricing procedure record that's associated with this pricing action.

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: The following is an example of a PricingActionParameters component.
